query:
SELECT lastFromMe, lastStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM wa_conversations
WHERE lastFromMe = 1
GROUP BY lastFromMe, lastStatus
ORDER BY cnt DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute 
SELECT lastFromMe, lastStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM wa_conversations
WHERE lastFromMe = 1
GROUP BY lastFromMe, lastStatus
